title: Delrith
wikitext:
{{Otheruses|the music track|Delrith (music track)|def=no}}{{External|rs|rsc}} {{Switch infobox |text1 = Normal |item1 = {{Infobox Monster |name = Delrith |image = [[File:Delrith.png|250x250px]] |release = [[4 January]] [[2001]] |update = Runescape beta is now online! |members = No |combat = 27 |size = 2 |examine = A freshly summoned demon. |xpbonus = |max hit = 9 |aggressive = No |poisonous = No |attack style = [[Crush]] |attack speed = 6 |hitpoints = 7 |att = 11 |str = 10 |def = 5 |mage = 1 |range = 1 |attbns = 0 |strbns = 0 |amagic = 0 |mbns = 0 |arange = 0 |rngbns = 0 |dstab = 0 |dslash = 0 |dcrush = 0 |dmagic = 0 |drange = 0 |immunepoison = no |immunevenom = no |id = 5079 |leagueRegion = Misthalin }} |text2 = Weakened |item2 = {{Infobox NPC |name = Weakened Delrith |image = [[File:Weakened Delrith.png|250x250px]] |release = [[29 March]] [[2004]] |update = RS2 Launched! |level = 1 |members = No |race = [[Demon]] |quest = [[Demon Slayer]] |location = Varrock Stone Circle |options = Banish |examine = The demon doesn't look so strong now. |map = No |id = 5080 |leagueRegion = Misthalin }} }} '''Delrith''' is a [[Zamorak]]ian{{CiteNPC|npc=|quote=One of Zamorak's unholy demons.|loc=Medium statue|notes=|name=}} [[demon]] summoned by [[dark wizard]]s from a [[stone table (Delrith)|stone table]] during the [[Demon Slayer]] quest. Delrith is relatively easy to kill and players can evade the wizards if they take their time. Low-levelled players should exercise caution, however as the wizards will deal significant damage against them. All damage dealt to Delrith is doubled when Silverlight is equipped.{{CiteTwitter|author=Mod Ash|url=https://twitter.com/JagexAsh/status/710844412285288450|date=18 March 2016|archiveurl=https://reldo.runescape.wiki/i/96363|archivedate=20 April 2023|quote=Yes, any damage dealt to Delrith is doubled if the attacker is wielding Silverlight.}} [[Ring of recoil]] damage will therefore always inflict 2 on Delrith when he lands a successful hit on the player. When using a ring of recoil to lower Delrith's hitpoints, it's not necessary to deal any damage to him directly in order to finish the quest; you must simply have Silverlight equipped. Additionally, by wielding Silverlight, mages can manually cast spells to quickly finish him off. ==History== 150 years ago, a cult of chaos druids summoned Delrith. Immediately after being summoned, he was confronted by [[Wally]], the ancestor of [[Sir Prysin]], who defeated Delrith with the powerful weapon known as [[Silverlight]] and sealed him in the [[stone table (Delrith)|stone table]]. In the present day during the events of [[Demon Slayer]], [[Denath]] (later revealed to be the demon [[Agrith-Naar]]) and his group of [[dark wizard]]s successfully freed Delrith, only for him to be defeated by Silverlight and sealed away once more- this time by the [[Player character|player]]. ==Changes== {{Subject changes header}} {{Subject changes |date = 29 August 2006 |update = Demons, Dragons and Giants |change = *The NPC was graphically updated with the rework of Demon Slayer. *A "Banish" option was added to Weakened Delrith. }} {{Subject changes footer}} ===Gallery (historical)=== Normal= {|style="text-align: center" cellpadding="15" |[[File:Delrith (historical).png|300x150px]] |[[File:Delrith.png|300x150px]] |- |29 March 2004 –
29 August 2006 |29 August 2006 –
present |} |-| Weakened= {|style="text-align: center" cellpadding="15" |[[File:Weakened Delrith (historical).png|300x150px]] |[[File:Weakened Delrith.png|300x150px]] |- |29 March 2004 –
29 August 2006 |29 August 2006 –
present |} ==Trivia== *In the third [[Postbag from the Hedge]], it is joked that Delrith was so weak and did not attack Varrock during the quest because he was embarrassed by his not wearing any clothes.{{CitePostbag|issue=3|letter=Letter 5|author=Delrith}} *The [[Demon butler]] used to serve Delrith as a personal valet. *The Zamorak version of the [[medium statue]] that can be built in the [[player-owned house]] depicts Delrith as his original model. This is revealed by the config name of the statue being poh_statue_delrith. ==References== {{reflist}} {{Demon Slayer}} {{Demons}} [[Category:Bosses]] [[Category:Quest monsters]] [[Category:Zamorakians]]
